string.name: permission_camera_reason
string.value: 用于拍照识别药盒信息，自动添加用药提醒

string.name: permission_microphone_reason
string.value: 用于语音交互，支持语音设置和查询用药提醒

string.name: permission_vibrate_reason
string.value: 用于操作反馈和提醒震动提示

string.name: permission_read_media_reason
string.value: 用于读取药品图片，展示在提醒卡片中

string.name: permission_write_media_reason
string.value: 用于保存拍摄的药品图片

string.name: permission_reminder_reason
string.value: 用于系统级用药提醒，确保提醒准时到达

string.name: permission_background_reason
string.value: 用于后台运行提醒服务，确保用药提醒准时提醒

string.name: permission_notification_reason
string.value: 用于发送用药提醒通知，确保您按时服药
